creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your contribution.

If the port is broken on an architecture instead of known not to be supported, set e.g.

    BROKEN_i386= ... error message ...

If you set ONLY_FOR_ARCHS, you should also provide ONLY_FOR_ARCHS reason.  Note that ONLY_FOR_ARCHS prevents builds on architectures you didn't test, too.  It should thus be reserved for when you know that it won't work on other architectures.  Use BROKEN_... or NOT_FOR_ARCHS instead if it doesn't build on some architectures.

Please use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION if possible.
